[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101100 3
1 000000000 a
2 000000011 2
3 011000111 5
4 000000011 2
5 100100010 3
6 011100100 4
7 010101101 5

01 10 010101101 5 match 7
12 21 000101100 3 match 0
23 32 000000000 a match 1
34 43 000000011 2 match 2 4
45 54 011000111 5 match 3
56 65 000000011 2 match 2 4
67 76 100100010 3 match 5
70 07 011100100 4 match 6

02 20 000101100 3 match 0
13 31 100000001 2
24 42 000000100 1
35 53 000000011 2 match 2 4
46 64 000000011 2 match 2 4
57 75 011000110 4
60 06 000100001 2
71 17 110100100 4

14 41 010000101 3

61 16 100100001 3
72 27 000100100 2
